name: Dentsply Sirona Inc.
description: Dentsply Sirona Inc. is a leading American manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the company provides a comprehensive portfolio of solutions, including dental equipment, consumables, and cloud-enabled digital platforms. With a presence in over 120 countries, Dentsply Sirona focuses on empowering dental professionals to provide better, safer, and faster dental care. The company is publicly traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol XRAY and is recognized for its commitment to innovation, clinical education, and improving oral health outcomes for patients worldwide.
